news.title: Berenberg Adjusts Price Target on Sociedad Quimica Y Minera De Chile to $66 From $56, Maintains Hold Rating
news.summary: SQM reported strong Q1 2026 results with a 25% YoY increase in lithium sales volume and raised 2026 volume guidance, driving a 7.1% stock price increase. Despite missing EPS estimates, the company's low-cost lithium position and rising EV/ESS demand support a bullish outlook.
